channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: SANTA MONICA, Calif. (AP) — Isaac Ukwu's sights were solely set on just playing in the NFL — until two season-ending knee injuries in college served as a harsh reality of football's fragility. The setbacks reshaped Ukwu's perspective, showing him that football was part of him, but not all of him.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Real Madrid beats Atletico on penalties in Champions League. Arsenal, Villa, Dortmund also advance
item.description: Real Madrid beat Atletico Madrid in a Champions League penalty shootout — again — to keep its title defense alive Wednesday and advance to the quarterfinals. Defender Antonio Rüdiger scored the decisive spot-kick in a 4-2 shootout win after two Atletico players missed.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canadian trans athlete's controversial women's basketball championship run ends after tournament upset
item.description: Vancouver Island University's women's basketball team lost in the national tournament Wednesday, capping a championship run of controversy over a transgender player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With Allen's personal and financial life set, Bills QB focuses on unfinished business
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — As blessed as Josh Allen considers himself following a year in which he was voted NFL MVP, got engaged to a Hollywood actor and became one of the league’s top-paid players, one item remains on the Buffalo Bills quarterback’s to-do list. Win a Super Bowl, of course.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rams release Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp
item.description: The Los Angles Rams cut Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp after being unable to find a trade partner for their former No. 1 wide receiver. The Rams officially moved on from the 2021 AP NFL Offensive Player of the Year at the start of the league year on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: La Jolla Country Day 17, Rancho Bernardo 4
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Lacrosse in the north county on Tuesday evening with La Jolla Country Day beating Rancho Bernardo 17-4.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: ESPN analyst suggests Shedeur Sanders is facing criticism because of his skin color
item.description: ESPN analyst and "First Take" host Ryan Clark said on Wednesday that Shedeur Sanders faces criticism because of the "color of his skin.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Virginia track athlete facing assault charge after baton strike she said was accidental
item.description: Alaila Everett said it was an accident but court records show she is now facing a potential assault and battery charge.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, NewsNation

item.title: March Madness selection panel will have to juggle thanks to SEC overload in bracket
item.description: The NCAA selection committee will have some juggling to do before the bracket comes out Sunday to keep March Madness from looking like an extension of the Southeastern Conference's regular season.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills agree to terms with five-time Pro Bowler Joey Bosa on 1-year contract: reports
item.description: The Buffalo Bills agreed to terms with star pass-rusher Joey Bosa on a one-year contract worth $12.6 million after Bosa was released by the Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills to re-sign Hamlin. Buffalo also adds defensive tackle Ogunjobi to 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: Safety Damar Hamlin is returning to Buffalo, and the Bills also continued restocking their their defensive front by agreeing to sign tackle Larry Ogunjobi.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A stint in the minors forced Pens' goalie Tristan Jarry to hit the reset button. It may have worked
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Tristan Jarry's career was at a crossroads in mid-January. The Pittsburgh Penguins goaltender was struggling and even worse, the franchise's faith in him appeared to be shot.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes knocked out of Big 12 Tournament by UCF
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tumultuous season for the Runnin' Utes, and it most likely came to an end Tuesday night with an 87-72 loss to UCF in the first round of the Big 12 Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Eagles send Gardner-Johnson to Texans. Vikings bolster offensive, defensive lines in NFL free agency
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles' top-ranked defense is getting a major makeover a month after ending Patrick Mahomes' bid to lead the Kansas City Chiefs to a third consecutive Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Two-time Super Bowl champion Justin Reid lands with Saints: reports
item.description: Justin Reid appears to have found a new home for next season. According to multiple reports, the star defensive back and the Saints reached an agreement on a three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA-leading Cavaliers beat Nets 109-104 for their second 15-game win streak of season
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — All-Star Darius Garland scored 18 of his 30 points in the fourth quarter and the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers rallied for a 109-104 victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Tuesday night, matching the longest winning streak in franchise history at 15 games.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN DULIK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aztecs Men's Basketball to face Boise State in Mountain West Tournament Quarterfinals, Magoon Gwath status day to day
item.description: 4-seed Aztecs Men's Basketball to face 5-seed Boise State in Mountain West Tournament Quarterfinals, 7-foot forward Magoon Gwath status day to day.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Scottie Scheffler looking at a blank canvas as he goes for a 3rd straight Players Championship
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The Players Championship has four decades of history at TPC Sawgrass suggesting it doesn't favor a particular style of golf — power player or pea shooter, great short game or consummate iron player. And then Scottie Scheffler came along.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry becomes investor in Unrivaled Basketball
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Stephen Curry has joined Unrivaled basketball as an investor. The Golden State Warriors guard is the latest sports star to join the 3v3 basketball league as an investor, joining the likes of the NBA's Giannis Antetokounmpo and Carmelo Anthony, and tennis star Coco Gauff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: George, Filipowski score 25 in Jazz loss to Sixers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George and Kyle Filipowski each scored 25 points, but the Utah Jazz dropped its fifth straight game, losing at Philadelphia Sunday night, 126-122. Lonnie Walker IV and Quentin Grimes scored 25 points apiece for the victories 76ers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Soldier Field to host Premier League doubleheader this summer
item.description: The Premier League Summer Series is coming to Chicago this summer, featuring four Premier League clubs - AFC Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United, and West Ham United - in a doubleheader at Soldier Field on Wednesday, July 30.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges against Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy
item.description: Xavier Worthy was arrested Friday and has since been released after the county's district attorney said he would not accept the case at this time.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Raiders acquire quarterback Geno Smith from Seahawks for a 3rd-round pick, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders answered their most pressing personnel question of the offseason Friday by acquiring quarterback Geno Smith in a trade with Seattle and reuniting him with his former coach, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Francisco State University cutting men's soccer and 2 other sports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- San Francisco State University announced plans on Thursday to cut three sports programs as part of its budget planning. The announced cuts follow a budget meeting last week that was "particularly difficult," according to an open letter posted by SFSU President Lynn Mahoney.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Special Olympics Illinois athletes head to Italy for snowshoe races
item.description: On Wednesday, a team of Special Olympics Illinois snowshoe athletes boarded a plane to New York, with a final destination of Turin, Italy. There they will compete in the Special Olympics Winter World Games.
item.dc:creator: Erin McElroy, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Volleyball: The Bishop's School 3, La Jolla 1
item.description: Boys Volleyball matchup is the battle of Pearl street between The Bishop's school Knights and La Jolla Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5
